text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
It's all right! Even Umamusume run the wrong way
sometimes, as they say. Think nothing of it!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: In any case, it's the thought that counts.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: Thank you for trying so hard on my behalf.
